title: TC-FALCON-EQ-001: Custom EQ slider values persist after pressing Save EQ button and confirming
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list to enter device settings.
Select the 'Custom' EQ preset from the available preset list.
Adjust the first EQ slider (e.g., 100Hz band) to maximum value (100).
Adjust the second EQ slider (e.g., 1kHz band) to minimum value (0).
Adjust the third EQ slider (e.g., 10kHz band) to mid-range value (50).
Tap the 'Save EQ' button located at the bottom of the Equalizer screen.
Observe the confirmation dialog that appears.
Verify the confirmation dialog title reads 'Save Custom EQ'.
Verify the confirmation dialog description text reads: 'Your custom equalizer settings will be saved and applied to the device.'
Wait for the confirmation dialog to dismiss and return to the Equalizer screen.
Navigate away from the Equalizer screen (e.g., tap back arrow to return to Audio Settings).
Re-open the Equalizer screen by navigating Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
Verify the 100Hz band slider is still at position 100.
Verify the 1kHz band slider is still at position 0.
Verify the 10kHz band slider is still at position 50.
expected: After pressing Save EQ and confirming, all Custom EQ slider values persist when re-opening the Equalizer screen. The confirmation dialog displays the correct title and description text.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-002: Custom EQ slider persistence after Save EQ + app backgrounding and reopening
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Press the Home button on the phone to background the app.
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from the app switcher or home screen.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
expected: Custom EQ slider values persist after app backgrounding and reopening when saved via the Save EQ button.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-003: Custom EQ slider persistence after Save EQ + app force-kill and relaunch
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Fully close (force-kill) the Poly Studio Mobile app from the phone's app switcher or settings.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
expected: Custom EQ slider values persist after app force-kill and relaunch when saved via the Save EQ button.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-004: Custom EQ slider persistence after Save EQ + Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Navigate back to the main device screen.
Disconnect Bluetooth: On the phone, go to Settings → Bluetooth → tap the Falcon device → select 'Disconnect' (or turn off Bluetooth).
Reconnect Bluetooth: On the phone, go to Settings → Bluetooth → tap the Falcon device → select 'Connect' (or turn Bluetooth back on).
Wait for the Poly Studio Mobile app to show the Falcon device as connected.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
expected: Custom EQ slider values persist after Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect when saved via the Save EQ button.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-005: Custom EQ slider persistence after Save EQ + device power off and on
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Navigate back to the main device screen.
Power off the Falcon device by pressing and holding the power button until the device powers down.
Power on the Falcon device by pressing the power button.
Wait for the device to reconnect to the smartphone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app (if not already open).
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
expected: Custom EQ slider values persist after device power off and on when saved via the Save EQ button.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-006: Custom EQ slider persistence after Save EQ + phone reboot
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Navigate back to the main device screen.
After phone restarts, ensure Bluetooth is enabled.
Wait for the Falcon device to reconnect automatically (or manually pair if needed).
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
expected: Custom EQ slider values persist after phone reboot when saved via the Save EQ button.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-007: Save EQ confirmation dialog displays correct description text
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Adjust any EQ slider to a non-default value (e.g., set 100Hz slider to 50).
Observe the confirmation dialog that appears.
Verify the dialog title reads: 'Save Custom EQ'.
Verify the dialog description/message text reads exactly: 'Your custom equalizer settings will be saved and applied to the device.'
Verify the dialog has a 'Cancel' button (or 'Dismiss') and a 'Confirm' (or 'Save') button.
Verify the dialog dismisses and the EQ slider values remain unchanged (100Hz slider still at 50).
Verify the dialog dismisses and the EQ settings are saved.
expected: The confirmation dialog displays the correct title 'Save Custom EQ' and description 'Your custom equalizer settings will be saved and applied to the device.' Both Cancel and Confirm buttons function correctly.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-008: Save EQ with all sliders at minimum (0) values
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Set ALL EQ sliders (100Hz, 300Hz, 1kHz, 3kHz, 10kHz) to minimum value (0).
Navigate away from the Equalizer screen (tap back arrow).
Re-open the Equalizer screen by navigating Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
Verify ALL EQ sliders are still at position 0.
expected: Custom EQ settings with all sliders at minimum (0) are correctly saved and persist after reopening the Equalizer screen.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-009: Save EQ with all sliders at maximum (100) values
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Set ALL EQ sliders (100Hz, 300Hz, 1kHz, 3kHz, 10kHz) to maximum value (100).
Navigate away from the Equalizer screen (tap back arrow).
Re-open the Equalizer screen by navigating Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
Verify ALL EQ sliders are still at position 100.
expected: Custom EQ settings with all sliders at maximum (100) are correctly saved and persist after reopening the Equalizer screen.

title: TC-FALCON-EQ-010: Save EQ after rapid slider adjustments between extreme values
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
Tap the Falcon device name from the device list.
Rapidly drag the 100Hz slider from 0 to 100 and back to 0 three times in quick succession.
Rapidly drag the 1kHz slider from 100 to 0 and back to 100 three times in quick succession.
Set the 100Hz slider to final value of 80.
Set the 1kHz slider to final value of 20.
Set the 10kHz slider to final value of 55.
Navigate away from the Equalizer screen (tap back arrow).
Re-open the Equalizer screen by navigating Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Verify the 'Custom' preset is still selected.
expected: After rapid slider adjustments between extreme values, the final slider positions are correctly saved via the Save EQ button and persist after reopening.
